name: framework-research
description: Research team designing the multi-team AI agent framework for Eesti Raudtee. Studies existing team patterns, identifies risks, and evolves the framework design.

lore.origin: Irish/Nordic — the seeker, the wanderer who gathers knowledge from distant places
lore.significance: A research coordinator who ranges across sources and returns with structured findings

lore.origin: Italian Renaissance — the Medici family, patrons of knowledge, art, and systematic excellence
lore.significance: An auditor who measures the health of knowledge artifacts, ensuring coherence and quality across the team's output

lore.origin: Classical Spanish literature — Celestina from Fernando de Rojas' La Celestina (1499), the matchmaker; Marcela from Cervantes' Don Quixote, the independent judge
lore.significance: An Agent Resources Manager who matches problems to specialists (Celestina) and holds firm on role quality (Marcela)

lore.origin: Italian physicist (1745–1827), inventor of the electric battery — first reliable energy storage and release across cycles
lore.significance: A lifecycle engineer who ensures each team session starts clean, runs reliably, and hands off state intact to the next cycle
